nodes.title: Simulated Annealing: From Physics to Optimization
nodes.excerpt: Introduction The idea of Simulated Annealing (SA) has always fascinated me. I first heard about annealing in physics classes, then later saw…

In this class, students study and learn how to defend themselves against all aspects of the Dark Arts, including dark creatures, curses, hexes and jinxes (dark charms), and duelling.
